query:
-- Check quotations total
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as cantidad_cotizaciones,
  SUM(CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_cotizaciones
FROM quotations
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;

-- Check projects with quotationId
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as proyectos_con_cotizacion,
  SUM(CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_proyectos_con_cotizacion
FROM projects
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL 
  AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
  AND quotationId IS NOT NULL;

-- Check projects WITHOUT quotationId
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as proyectos_sin_cotizacion,
  SUM(CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_proyectos_sin_cotizacion
FROM projects
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL 
  AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
  AND quotationId IS NULL
